name: cut-out
title: Cut Out
description: Delete a horizontal or vertical strip from an image and stitch the remaining parts
author: lemikeone

preferences.name: exportMode
preferences.title: Export Mode
preferences.description: Choose whether the edited image overwrites the source or creates a new file

preferences.name: revealInFinder
preferences.title: After Export
preferences.description: Reveal the output image in Finder after processing
preferences.label: Reveal output in Finder

preferences.name: openAfterExport
preferences.description: Open the output image with the default image app after processing
preferences.label: Open output image

commands.name: cut-out-image-section-from-selection
commands.title: Cut out Image Section from Selection
commands.description: Delete a horizontal or vertical strip from the selected Finder image

commands.name: cut-out-image-section-from-clipboard
commands.title: Cut out Image Section from Clipboard
commands.description: Delete a horizontal or vertical strip from the clipboard image, then copy it back

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
